summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building distributed systems and cloud-native applications at scale. Proven track record of leading platform migrations, reducing infrastructure costs, and mentoring engineering teams. Passionate about developer experience and high-availability architecture.
skills: Python, Go, TypeScript, SQL, Bash, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Docker, Helm, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC, CI/CD, TDD, Observability, Agile
certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (2023), Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA, 2022), Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect (2021)

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer — Platform
experience.description: Lead a team of 6 engineers building internal developer platform tooling serving 4,000+ AWS engineers. Redesigned container orchestration layer using Kubernetes and Helm, reducing deploy times by 62%. Drove adoption of gRPC-based service mesh replacing legacy REST adapters; cut p99 latency from 320ms to 48ms. Authored RFC and implemented blue/green deployment framework now used across 14 service teams.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description: Built and maintained core payment processing pipelines in Go handling $2B+ in annual transaction volume. Implemented idempotency key system that reduced duplicate charges by 99.97% across all API endpoints. Collaborated with security team to harden webhook delivery with HMAC signing and replay protection. Contributed to internal observability tooling: distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry, custom Grafana dashboards.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Designed and shipped RESTful enrichment API serving 50M+ requests/month for B2B SaaS customers. Migrated monolithic Rails app to microservices architecture; improved deployment frequency from weekly to daily. Built data ingestion pipeline (Python/Kafka) processing 10M company records from 200+ third-party sources.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed search and ranking algorithms for people-search product with 30M monthly active users. Maintained Python/Django backend services and wrote unit/integration test suites (pytest, 85% coverage).
